title: Jamaican Bao Burgers
description: A flavorful twist on traditional burgers, featuring Jamaican seasoning and served on a soft bao bun.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. In a large bowl, mix together Quick fix patty mix and Jamaican seasoning.
3. Divide the mixture into 4 equal parts and shape into patties.
4. Grill the patties for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, toast the Bao buns on the grill or in a toaster.
6. Assemble the burgers by spreading a slice of Cheddar cheese on the bottom bun, followed by a patty, a dollop of Fermented hot sauce, and finally the top bun.
